text: HUMAN WINS — reinforce for Halim/PPO: • [good_cut] Top contributors (NAK, RXT, ELAB, VSA, MASK) were fast momentum round-trips — enter on vol spike, exit into strength, flat before next setup. → ENTER on volume_spike/momentum_breakout; EXIT via spike_top_exit; complete round-trip. • [productive_turnover] Basic materials +13.59% — high turnover paid when trend + vol aligned. → Favor momentum_breakout in strong sectors; keep turnover high only there. • [good_stand_aside] Ending 100% cash after +35% period — bank gains, stop forcing trades. → Session stand-aside when daily target hit or edge metrics fall below floor. • USEG (Energy): +4.0% contribution +3.2% | $+77 Pattern: Energy CAN win — same sector as PLUG loss; ENTER on spike, EXIT disciplined. Learn from contrast. • NAK (Basic Materials): +7.8% contribution +7.2% | $+154 Pattern: ENTER momentum spike; EXIT into strength — model round-trip. • RXT (Technology): +9.1% contribution +7.2% | $+165 Pattern: Fast tech scalp with vol — take profit at spike top. • ELAB (Basic Materials): +13.4% contribution +5.7% | $+130 Pattern: Materials momentum — enter early vol, exit before giveback. • VSA (Education): +12.0% contribution +5.3% | $+121 Pattern: Spike capture on thin name — size within risk, exit quick. • MASK (Technology): +5.9% contribution +5.2% | $+118 Pattern: Vol-led entry, mechanical exit — no human hesitation.
